calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order Granting Second Request For Extension Of Time To Administer Estate.  Appearance Required On Apr-13-2027 If No Petition Has Been Filed By Mar-30-2027

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report Of Status With A Petition Requesting Additional Time For Estate Administration Must Be Filed At Least Two Weeks Before That Status Date. Appearance Will Be Required On 4/13/27 If No Petition Has Been Filed.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Apr-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kaycee Link for petitioner Daniel Levin (via Zoom).

The Court noted that no waiver of notice was filed for the two heirs, that counsel will need to submit for new letters, and that the order appointing will need to be corrected so letters can be issued.

The matter is continued to April 14, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Kaycee Link, Esq. for Daniel Levin, Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court and counsel confer regarding the will. Ms. Link stated that the witnesses didn't sign under penalty of perjury, that the signatures are illegible, that the will was executed 47 years ago, and that she is unable to track the individuals down. The Court stated that under 240 that counsel cannot access the witnesses.

The Court then granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated December 15, 1976, is admitted to probate. Daniel B. Levin is appointed as the Administrator with will Annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for October 29, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ronld E. Quidachay. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Jaime. Matter not reported.
